Spell Effect: Acid Arrow.description: Deals [[/r 1d6]] damage a round. The bolt remains in the target for as long as you focus.
Spell Effect: Acid Arrow.name: Spell Effect: Acid Arrow

Spell Effect: Anathema.description:
Enchanted with another creature.

Each time one of the affected creatures takes damage, it may make a [[check 15 cha]] check. On a success, the spell ends.
Spell Effect: Anathema.name: Spell Effect: Anathema

Spell Effect: Barkskin.description:
Your skin hardens into tough tree bark. Your AC becomes 14 (18 on a critical spellcasting check) for the spell's duration.

You take double damage from fire while you are under the spell's effects.
Spell Effect: Barkskin.name: Spell Effect: Barkskin

Spell Effect: Barkskin (Critical).description:
Your skin hardens into tough tree bark. Your AC becomes 14 (18 on a critical spellcasting check) for the spell's duration.

You take double damage from fire while you are under the spell's effects.
Spell Effect: Barkskin (Critical).name: Spell Effect: Barkskin (Critical)

Spell Effect: Blind.description: The creature is blind and has disadvantage on tasks requiring sight.
Spell Effect: Blind.name: Spell Effect: Blind

Spell Effect: Bogboil.description: A creature stuck in the web can’t move and must succeed on a Strength check opposed by the caster’s spellcasting check to free itself.
Spell Effect: Bogboil.name: Spell Effect: Bogboil

Spell Effect: Breath.description: You can hold your breath for the spell's duration.
Spell Effect: Breath.name: Spell Effect: Breath

Spell Effect: Broomstick.description: The broomstick's rider can fly a near distance each round and can hover in place.
Spell Effect: Broomstick.name: Spell Effect: Broomstick

Spell Effect: Cacklerot.description: Collapsed helplessly with disturbing, pained laughter for the spell's duration.
Spell Effect: Cacklerot.name: Spell Effect: Cacklerot

Spell Effect: Cast Out.description: For the spell's duration, that creature can't come within near range of you. It can still attack you from outside of near range.
Spell Effect: Cast Out.name: Spell Effect: Cast Out

Spell Effect: Cat's Eye.description: You can see invisible creatures and secret doors for the spell's duration.
Spell Effect: Cat's Eye.name: Spell Effect: Cat's Eye

Spell Effect: Chant.description: For the spell's duration, you can see all invisible and hidden things as though they were plainly visible. This spell does not allow you to see in a way that you could not normally, such as in darkness or through walls.
Spell Effect: Chant.name: Spell Effect: Chant

Spell Effect: Charm Person.description:
The humanoid regards the caster as a friend for the duration.
The effect ends if you or your allies do anything harmful to the target.
Spell Effect: Charm Person.name: Spell Effect: Charm Person

Spell Effect: Cleansing Weapon.description: One weapon you touch is wreathed in purifying flames. It deals an additional [[/r 1d4]] damage ([[/r 1d6]] vs. undead) for the duration.
Spell Effect: Cleansing Weapon.name: Spell Effect: Cleansing Weapon

Spell Effect: Cloak of Night.description:
For the spell's duration, your armor class becomes 17 (20 on a critical spellcasting check).

You have advantage on Dexterity checks to sneak and hide for the spell's duration.
Spell Effect: Cloak of Night.name: Spell Effect: Cloak of Night

Spell Effect: Cloak of Night (Critical).description:
For the spell's duration, your armor class becomes 17 (20 on a critical spellcasting check).

You have advantage on Dexterity checks to sneak and hide for the spell's duration.
Spell Effect: Cloak of Night (Critical).name: Spell Effect: Cloak of Night (Critical)

Spell Effect: Command.description:
The target obeys the command for as long as you focus.

If your command is ever directly harmful to the creature, it may make a Charisma check vs. your last spellcasting check. On a success, the spell ends.
Spell Effect: Command.name: Spell Effect: Command

Spell Effect: Confusion.description: The target can't take actions, and it moves in a random direction on its turn. If the target is LV 9+, it may make a WIS check vs. your last spellcasting check at the start of its turn to end the spell.
Spell Effect: Confusion.name: Spell Effect: Confusion

Spell Effect: Detect Magic.description: You can sense the presence of magic within near range for the spell's duration. If you focus for two rounds, you discern its general properties. Full barriers block this spell.
Spell Effect: Detect Magic.name: Spell Effect: Detect Magic

Spell Effect: Divine Vengeance.description: For the spell's duration, you can fly a near distance, your weapons are magical, and you have a +4 bonus to your weapon attacks and damage.
Spell Effect: Divine Vengeance.name: Spell Effect: Divine Vengeance

Spell Effect: Evoke Rage.description:
The target is immune to morale checks, has ADV on STR checks and melee attacks, and deals +1d4 damage for the spell's duration.

If the target does not attack another creature on its turn, the spell ends.
Spell Effect: Evoke Rage.name: Spell Effect: Evoke Rage

Spell Effect: Eyebite.description: Target can't see you until the end of its next turn.
Spell Effect: Eyebite.name: Spell Effect: Eyebite

Spell Effect: Fly.description: You can fly near for the spell's duration and are able to hover in place.
Spell Effect: Fly.name: Spell Effect: Fly

Spell Effect: Freya's Omen.description:
For the spell's duration, you do not lose the ability to cast a spell if you fail its spellcasting check.

If you critically fail a spellcasting check, you may reroll your check once. You must use the new result.
Spell Effect: Freya's Omen.name: Spell Effect: Freya's Omen

Spell Effect: Gaseous Form.description:
You and your gear turn into a cloud of smoke for the spell's duration.

You can fly and pass through any gap that smoke could. You can sense the terrain and any movement around you out to a near distance.

You can't cast spells while in this form.
Spell Effect: Gaseous Form.name: Spell Effect: Gaseous Form

Spell Effect: Glassbones.description: Takes double damage for the spell's duration.
Spell Effect: Glassbones.name: Spell Effect: Glassbones

Spell Effect: Hallucinate.description: For the spell's duration, the target cannot act on its turn unless it passes a Wisdom check equal to your last spellcasting check.
Spell Effect: Hallucinate.name: Spell Effect: Hallucinate

Spell Effect: Hold Monster.description: If the target is LV 9+, it may make a STR check vs. your last spellcasting check at the start of its turn to end the spell.
Spell Effect: Hold Monster.name: Spell Effect: Hold Monster

Holy Weapon.name: Holy Weapon
Holy Weapon.description: The weapon becomes magical and has +1 to attack and damage rolls for the duration.

Spell Effect: Hypnotize.description: The target can't take actions, and it moves in a random direction on its turn. If the target is LV 9+, it may make a WIS check vs. your last spellcasting check at the start of its turn to end the spell.
Spell Effect: Hypnotize.name: Spell Effect: Hypnotize

Spell Effect: Instill.description:
One weapon you wield is imbued with life force. It becomes a +1 weapon for the spell's duration.

If the weapon is a staff, it deals d6 damage instead of d4.
Spell Effect: Instill.name: Spell Effect: Instill

Spell Effect: Locusts.description:
A disorienting cloud of angry, biting locusts fills an area around you out to near.

The cloud moves with you as you move. You are not affected by it.

Creatures in the area of affect take [[/r 1d10]] damage per round at the start of their turn. They must pass a CON check equal to your last spellcasting check or be unable to move on their turn.
Spell Effect: Locusts.name: Spell Effect: Locusts

Spell Effect: Magnetize.description:
One object you touch up to the size of a horse becomes powerfully magnetized.

It attracts all smaller magnetic objects within near.

If it can move, it is pulled toward larger magnetic objects within near. A metal creature must pass a STR check equal to your spellcasting check to resist.
Spell Effect: Magnetize.name: Spell Effect: Magnetize

Spell Effect: Mistletoe.description:
Enchanted with another creature.

Each time one of the affected creatures takes damage, it may make a [[check 15 cha]] check. On a success, the spell ends.
Spell Effect: Mistletoe.name: Spell Effect: Mistletoe

Spell Effect: Oak, Ash, Thorn.description: For the spell’s duration, faeries, demons, and devils can't attack you. These beings also can’t possess, compel, or beguile you.
Spell Effect: Oak, Ash, Thorn.name: Spell Effect: Oak, Ash, Thorn

Spell Effect: Odin's Wisdom.description: For the spell's duration, add your level as an additional bonus to your Wisdom checks and spellcasting checks.
Spell Effect: Odin's Wisdom.name: Spell Effect: Odin's Wisdom

Spell Effect: Pillar of Salt.description: If you successfully focus on this spell for 3 rounds in a row, the transformation becomes permanent.
Spell Effect: Pillar of Salt.name: Spell Effect: Pillar of Salt

Spell Effect: Pin Doll.description: On your turn while focusing on this spell, you can push a pin into the doll. Each time you do this, the creature who the hair or flesh belonged to takes [[/r 2d6]] damage.
Spell Effect: Pin Doll.name: Spell Effect: Pin Doll

Spell Effect: Polymorph.description:
Target is transformed into another natural creature you choose of equal or smaller size. Any gear the target carries melds into its new form.

The target gains the creature's physical statistics, but it retains its non-physical statistics.

If the target goes to 0 hit points, it reverts to its true form at half its prior hit points.
Spell Effect: Polymorph.name: Spell Effect: Polymorph

Spell Effect: Protection from Energy (Co.description: For the spell's duration, the target is immune to harm from cold.
Spell Effect: Protection from Energy (Co.name: Spell Effect: Protection from Energy (Cold)

Spell Effect: Protection from Energy (El.description: For the spell's duration, the target is immune to harm from electricity.
Spell Effect: Protection from Energy (El.name: Spell Effect: Protection from Energy (Electricity)

Spell Effect: Protection from Energy (Fi.description: For the spell's duration, the target is immune to harm from fire.
Spell Effect: Protection from Energy (Fi.name: Spell Effect: Protection from Energy (Fire)

Spell Effect: Protection From Evil.description: Chaotic beings have disadvantage on attack rolls and hostile spellcasting checks against the target. These beings also can’t possess, compel, or beguile it.
Spell Effect: Protection From Evil.name: Spell Effect: Protection From Evil

Spell Effect: Puppet.description:
On your turn, the creature mimics all your movements.

If mimicking you would cause the creature to directly harm itself or an ally, it can make a [[check 15 cha]] check. On a success, it resists mimicking you.
Spell Effect: Puppet.name: Spell Effect: Puppet

Spell Effect: Shapechanger.description:
You transform yourself and any gear you carry into another natural creature you've seen of level 10 or less. You assume the creature's physical statistics, but you retain your non-physical statistics (such as INT, WIS, and CHA).

If you go to 0 HP while under the effects of this spell, you revert to your true form at 1 HP.
Spell Effect: Shapechanger.name: Spell Effect: Shapechanger

Spell Effect: Sleep.description: Injury or vigorous shaking wakes the creature.
Spell Effect: Sleep.name: Spell Effect: Sleep

Spell Effect: Soulbind.description:
For the spell's duration, all other spells targeting the creature (harmful or helpful) are DC 18 to cast.

This spell ends as soon as the target is affected by another spell.
Spell Effect: Soulbind.name: Spell Effect: Soulbind

Spell Effect: Spidersilk.description: For the spell's duration, you can walk on vertical surfaces as easily as if it were flat ground.
Spell Effect: Spidersilk.name: Spell Effect: Spidersilk

Spell Effect: Summon Storm.description:
You summon a violent storm that affects an area around you out to one mile for the duration.

The storm brings darkened skies, severe wind, and driving rain.

For the duration of the spell, you can cast control water (Shadowdark RPG pg. 57), even if you do not know the spell.

For the duration of the spell, you can cast lightning bolt (Shadowdark RPG pg. 64), even if you do not know the spell.

@UUID[Compendium.shadowdark.spells.Item.TKDuwFu1hP2lX549]{Control Water}

@UUID[Compendium.shadowdark.spells.Item.7uTblEDfklCO1et7]{Lightning Bolt}
Spell Effect: Summon Storm.name: Spell Effect: Summon Storm

Spell Effect: Treeshape.description:
You and your gear turn into a treant with the below stats for the spell's duration.

You do not have the treant's Animate Tree talent.

You cannot cast spells while under the effect of this spell.

You retain your INT, WIS, and CHA stats.

AC 14, HP 38, ATK 2 slam +8 (1d12) or 1 rock (far) +8 (2d6), MV near, S +4, D -1, C +2, I *, W *, Ch *, AL N, LV 8
Spell Effect: Treeshape.name: Spell Effect: Treeshape

Spell Effect: Void Stare.description: Under your control. You decide its actions during its turn.
Spell Effect: Void Stare.name: Spell Effect: Void Stare

Spell Effect: Web.description: A creature stuck in the web can’t move and must succeed on a Strength check opposed by the casters spellcasting check to free itself.
Spell Effect: Web.name: Spell Effect: Web

Spell Effect: Wolfshape (Dire Wolf).description:
Dire Wolf

AC 12, HP 19, ATK 2 bite [[/r 1d20+4]] ([[/r 1d8]]), MV double near, S +3, D +2, C +1

Pack Hunter. Deals +1 damage while an ally is close.

You assume the wolf's STR, DEX, CON, HP, AC, speed, attacks, and physical characteristics, but retain your INT, WIS, and CHA.

You can cast spells in this form. If you go to 0 HP, you revert to your true shape at 0 HP.
Spell Effect: Wolfshape (Dire Wolf).name: Spell Effect: Wolfshape (Dire Wolf)

Spell Effect: Wolfshape (Winter Wolf).description:
Winter Wolf

AC 12, HP 23, ATK 2 bite [[/r 1d20+4]] ([[/r 1d6]]) or 1 frost breath, MV double near, S +3, D +2, C +1

Impervious. Cold immune.

Frost Breath. Fills a near-sized cube extending from winter wolf. [[check 15 dex]] or [[/r 3d8]] damage. Cannot use again for [[/r 1d4]] rounds.

You assume the wolf's STR, DEX, CON, HP, AC, speed, attacks, and physical characteristics, but retain your INT, WIS, and CHA.

You can cast spells in this form. If you go to 0 HP, you revert to your true shape at 0 HP.
Spell Effect: Wolfshape (Winter Wolf).name: Spell Effect: Wolfshape (Winter Wolf)

Spell Effect: Wolfshape (Wolf).description:
Wolf

AC 12, HP 10, ATK 1 bite [[/r 1d20+2]] ([[/r 1d6]]), MV double near, S +2, D +2, C +1

Pack Hunter. Deals +1 damage while an ally is close.

You assume the wolf's STR, DEX, CON, HP, AC, speed, attacks, and physical characteristics, but retain your INT, WIS, and CHA.

You can cast spells in this form. If you go to 0 HP, you revert to your true shape at 0 HP.
Spell Effect: Wolfshape (Wolf).name: Spell Effect: Wolfshape (Wolf)

Spell Effect: World Serpent.description: The target deals x2 damage with each attack (x4 on a critical hit) for the spell's duration.
Spell Effect: World Serpent.name: Spell Effect: World Serpent

Spell Effect: World Tree.description: For the spell's duration, the target can't be brought below 1 HP.
Spell Effect: World Tree.name: Spell Effect: World Tree

Spell Effect: Wrath.description: Your weapons become magical +2 and deal an additional d8 damage for the spell's duration.
Spell Effect: Wrath.name: Spell Effect: Wrath

Spell Effect: Zone of Truth.description: Can’t utter a deliberate lie when within range from source.
Spell Effect: Zone of Truth.name: Spell Effect: Zone of Truth
